svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="N3Kfi7by6GlsjJCmZeEk"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="562" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="3Ik30Wn5uIUf4yycpi0s-1" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;" value="
